hooks.command: $in = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($in.tool_input.command -match 'push origin master') { Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"VERSION REMINDER: Remember to bump the version number in index.html. Search for the current version (e.g. 0.2.0) and update APP.version, the version-chip span, the Om appen row, and the ICS PRODID string."}}' } else { exit 0 }
